summary: Phase 3 Live Mode enhancements tested. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). All 5 key Phase 3 features verified in UI: Smart School Filtering, Quick Templates, Live Stats Bar, Auto-clear & Focus, and SAVED indicator.
critical_code_review_comments: LiveEvent.js correctly implements all 5 Phase 3 enhancements
Smart School Filtering: targetSchoolsAtEvent from prep API is used to highlight athlete's target schools with emerald styling
Quick Templates: 6 templates populate textarea correctly, highlighted when active
Live Stats Bar: Session timer, notes count, athletes covered ratio, and capture rate all working
Keyboard shortcuts shown in stats bar: Ctrl+Enter for log, Esc for clear
Auto-clear & Focus: Form clears school/interest/text/followups after save, keeps athlete selected for rapid entry
SAVED indicator: Green flash animation on recently saved notes with checkmark icon
seed_data_creation: N/A - used existing seed data. event_1 (College Exposure Camp) has 3 athletes and 5 schools.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Live Mode enhancements fully tested. Live Event page at /events/event_1/live works with all new features: (1) Smart School Filtering - target schools highlighted green with 'Target schools first' hint when athlete selected, (2) Quick Templates - 6 one-tap templates populate textarea, (3) Live Stats Bar - shows session timer, notes count, athletes covered ratio, capture rate, and keyboard shortcuts, (4) Auto-clear & Focus - form clears after save but keeps athlete selected, (5) SAVED indicator - green flash on saved note with checkmark. data-testid selectors all working: live-event-page, live-stats-bar, session-timer, stat-notes-count, stat-athletes-covered, stat-rate, athlete-chips, athlete-chip-{id}, school-chips, school-chip-{id}, target-hint, interest-selector, interest-{value}, quick-templates, template-{name}, note-text, follow-ups, followup-{value}, log-note-btn, clear-form-btn, recent-notes-feed, saved-indicator.

frontend_ui: Live Event page loads with data-testid='live-event-page' - PASS
Live Stats Bar shows session timer, notes count, athletes covered, rate - PASS
3 athlete chips visible: Emma C., Olivia A., Sarah M. with green dots - PASS
5 school chips visible: UCLA, Stanford, USC, Virginia, Duke - PASS
Smart School Filtering: selecting athlete shows 'Target schools first' hint - PASS
Quick Templates: 6 template buttons visible and populate textarea - PASS
Interest selector: Hot, Warm, Cool, None buttons work - PASS
Follow-up checkboxes: Send film, Schedule call, Add to target list, Route to Support Pod - PASS
LOG NOTE button creates note with toast 'Saved — Emma Chen × UCLA' - PASS
Stats bar updates: notes count incremented from 14 to 15 - PASS
SAVED indicator appears on new note with green styling - PASS
Form auto-clears after save (school, interest, text, followups cleared) - PASS
Clear button (X) resets form fields correctly - PASS
Athlete chip stays selected after note save for rapid entry - PASS

verified_requirements.navigate_to_live_event: PASS - /events/event_1/live loads with 3 athletes and 5 schools
verified_requirements.live_stats_bar: PASS - shows session timer, notes count (15), athletes covered (3/3), rate (—)
verified_requirements.smart_school_filtering: PASS - target schools highlighted green with 'Target schools first' hint
verified_requirements.quick_templates: PASS - 6 templates: Strong performance, Coach showed interest, Needs more film, Good conversation, Offered visit, Standout skill
verified_requirements.log_note_flow: PASS - select athlete + school + interest + template + followup -> LOG NOTE -> toast + SAVED indicator
verified_requirements.stats_bar_updates: PASS - notes count increments, athletes covered updates
verified_requirements.clear_button: PASS - X button clears school, interest, text, followups but keeps athlete selected
verified_requirements.api_post_notes: PASS - POST /api/events/event_1/notes creates note and returns it
verified_requirements.api_get_notes: PASS - GET /api/events/event_1/notes returns notes sorted by captured_at desc
